creator: chris@cretaforce.gr
text:
(In reply to Andriy Gapon from comment #8)

zpool get cachefile
NAME   PROPERTY   VALUE      SOURCE
zroot  cachefile  -          default

zpool set cachefile=/boot/zfs/zpool.cache zroot

But after a reboot:

zpool get cachefile
NAME   PROPERTY   VALUE      SOURCE
zroot  cachefile  -          default

Any idea why it doesn't keep the value?
